mapper.select: SELECT te.id, te.name, te.description, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM team_members tm2 WHERE tm2.team_id = te.id ) AS memberCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM projects p WHERE p.team_id = te.id ) AS projectCount FROM teams te INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY te.name ASC

SELECT te.id, te.name, te.description, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM team_members tm2 WHERE tm2.team_id = te.id ) AS memberCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM projects p WHERE p.team_id = te.id ) AS projectCount FROM teams te INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id WHERE te.id = #{teamId} AND tm.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT tm.user_id AS userId, u.name, u.email, tm.team_role AS teamRole, tm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM team_members tm INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY tm.joined_at ASC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) ), 0 )::INTEGER AS progress FROM projects p LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE p.team_id = #{teamId} GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.status, p.created_at ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) ), 0 )::INTEGER AS progress FROM projects p LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE p.team_id = #{teamId} AND UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(p.status, ''), '-', '_')) IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'PLANNING') GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.status, p.created_at ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT p.id FROM projects p WHERE p.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY p.id ASC
